$schema: NPC dialogue table for the walk scene (Task 19). Slots: greeter, guide-wait, guide-arrive ({landmark} token). landmarks steer the guide NPC.
greeter: Welcome to the gallery — every wall has something to say.
Hello, and welcome in. Feel free to take it all in slowly.
Glad you're here. The collection rotates, so look closely.
Welcome. Quiet steps, open mind — enjoy the show.
guide-wait: Take your time with the pieces — I'll wait here.
No rush. Good art rewards a slow walk.
I'll pause by the pedestal until you're ready.
guide-arrive: Here's {landmark}. One of my favourites in the space.
We've reached {landmark}. Worth a long look.
